title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin presents a framework called the AI Layer for improving Claude Code's effectiveness in large codebases. The approach emphasizes that the harness around the model, including context, configuration, and tooling, matters more than the model itself, implemented through components like CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and plugins.
